raw: {"mode": "market_intel", "engine": "groq-llama-70b", "insight": "**Insight:** TIAMAT can build a quick solution for the unsolved problem of \"AI model drift detection\" - a common pain point for developers and data scientists who struggle to detect and adapt to changes in AI model performance over time. \n\n**Concrete Approach:** Develop a lightweight, GitHub-integrated tool that scans public GitHub repositories for PyTorch or TensorFlow models, detects model drift by analyzing performance metrics (e.g., accuracy, F1 score) across different epochs, and provides alerts and recommendations for model updates.", "run": 567}
